name: vb6-to-csharp
description: Governed VB6 → C# (ASP.NET Core) + TypeScript (Vite + React) migration toolkit. Slash commands, an architect subagent, and skills covering source inventory, user choices, approval gates, tests, parity ledgers, final builds, and closeout.

plugins.name: vb6-to-csharp
plugins.description: Inventory a VB6 codebase and migrate it through governed approval gates to ASP.NET Core + Vite + React.
